meanings.definition: a collection of things sharing a common attribute
examples: there are two classes of detergents

meanings.definition: a body of students who are taught together
examples: early morning classes are always sleepy

meanings.definition: people having the same social, economic, or educational status
education imparted in a series of lessons or meetings
examples: he took a course in basket weaving
flirting is not unknown in college classes
he played baseball in class D for two years
Princeton is in the NCAA Division 1-AA

meanings.definition: a body of students who graduate together
examples: she was in my year at Hoehandle High

meanings.definition: (biology) a taxonomic group containing one or more orders

examples: she has a lot of class

meanings.definition: arrange or order by classes or categories
examples: How would you classify these pottery shards--are they prehistoric?
